title: Headshot Photographer Tri-Cities WA | It's A Keeper
description: Professional headshots in the Tri-Cities you'll actually want to use. Relaxed sessions in Richland, Kennewick and Pasco — guided posing, natural light.

hero.heading: Professional Headshots in the Tri-Cities, WA
hero.intro: Headshots in Richland, Kennewick and Pasco that look like you on your best day — warm, confident and approachable, not stiff and corporate.

sections.heading: A Headshot You're Proud to Put Everywhere
paragraphs: Your headshot shows up before you do — on LinkedIn, your company's team page, the conference program, the "About" page someone checks before they ever call you. It deserves better than a cropped vacation photo or that stiff picture from three jobs ago.
My headshots are warm and genuinely you: professional enough for the boardroom, human enough that people feel like they've already met you.

sections.heading: Yes — Even If You Hate Having Your Picture Taken
paragraphs: Most people who book headshots with me open with the same line: "Just so you know, I'm terrible at this." You're not — you've just never been guided.

I'll direct you through the whole session: where to angle your shoulders, what to do with your hands, when to take a deep breath in through your nose and out through your mouth. Between prompts, the real expressions happen — and those are the frames you'll choose. One of the things clients mention most in my reviews is how at ease they felt, even the ones who dreaded coming.

sections.heading: How a Headshot Session Works
sections.intro: Headshot sessions are efficient on purpose — professionals don't have all afternoon.

items.heading: We plan quickly.
paragraphs: Where the headshot will live (LinkedIn? website? press?), what to wear, and the impression you want to give.

items.heading: We shoot.
paragraphs: Natural light, guided posing, a few backdrop or location changes for variety. Most headshot sessions are done within the hour.

items.heading: You choose.
paragraphs: You'll see a gallery of edited images — true-to-you retouching that keeps you looking like yourself, on a very good day.

sections.heading: Headshots for Teams
paragraphs: Consistent, warm headshots for your whole team — photographed at your Tri-Cities office or a location we choose, scheduled so it barely interrupts the workday. If your team page is a patchwork of selfies and ten-year-old photos, I can fix that in a morning.
Building a full brand image library instead?

items.heading: What should I wear for a headshot?
paragraphs: Solid colors near your face photograph best; avoid busy patterns and large logos. We'll talk it through before your session — bring two or three options and I'll help you choose.

items.heading: How long does a headshot session take?
paragraphs: Usually under an hour for individuals. Team sessions depend on headcount — tell me how many people and I'll map out the morning.

items.heading: Headshot or branding session — which do I need?
paragraphs: If you need one great portrait, a headshot. If you need a library of images of you, your work and your space, branding.

items.heading: Do you retouch headshots?
paragraphs: Gently. I'll take care of the temporary things — a blemish, a stray hair — and leave you looking like you. No plastic skin, no stranger's face.

finalCta.heading: Let's Update That Profile Photo
paragraphs: Tell me where your headshot needs to work and when you need it.
